creator: leres@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Mateusz Piotrowski from comment #11)
I just tried again and without the patch from https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=280749#c9 I still get the linker errors shown in https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=280749#c7

zinc 205 # find /usr/ports/security/fprintd
/usr/ports/security/fprintd
/usr/ports/security/fprintd/pkg-descr
/usr/ports/security/fprintd/make.log
/usr/ports/security/fprintd/pkg-plist
/usr/ports/security/fprintd/distinfo
/usr/ports/security/fprintd/Makefile
zinc 206 # cd /usr/ports/security/fprintd && git describe
14.0-eol-1619-g907282d289f
